summary: Restructured _init_provider() in n5_memory_client.py to check vector dimensions BEFORE loading the local SentenceTransformer model. Previously, the local model (~55s load time) was loaded first, then discarded if 3072-dim vectors were detected. Now auto-detection happens first, and the local model only loads when actually needed.
broadcast: Provider init restructured. Local model no longer loaded when OpenAI is the active provider. Init ~55s faster when vectors_v2.db with 3072-dim vectors is present.
